## What would you like GridOS to do?

<!-- Describe the capability in one or two sentences. -->

## What problem does it solve?

<!-- What's the use case? What are you trying to accomplish that GridOS doesn't support today? -->

## How would you expect it to work?

<!-- Walk through the UX, the prompt you'd type, or the API shape you'd want. -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Existing GridOS features, plugins, or other tools you've tried. -->

## Extra context

<!-- Screenshots, links, similar features in other products. Anything that helps. -->
